title: Do LLMs Game Formalization? Evaluating Faithfulness in Logical Reasoning
summary: Formal verification guarantees proof validity but not formalization faithfulness. For natural-language logical reasoning, where models construct axiom systems from scratch without library constraints, this gap between valid proofs and fa...
